creator: christos@freebsd.org
text:
Since 14.0-CURRENT, mixer(3) has been added to base system and mixer(8)
has been updated. The web man pages for 14.0-CURRENT don't reflect that
change yet.

mixer(3):
Web link: https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=mixer&apropos=0&sektion=3&manpath=FreeBSD+14.0-current&arch=default&format=html
New man page: https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/tree/lib/libmixer/mixer.3


mixer(8):
Web link: https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=mixer&apropos=0&sektion=8&manpath=FreeBSD+14.0-current&arch=default&format=html
New man page: https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/tree/usr.sbin/mixer/mixer.8
